# Deno Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno
```

The workflow builds every pinned Deno version for both `linux/amd64`
and `linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image pattern | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `denoland/deno:debian-<version>` | `latest`, `2.8`, `2.8.3` | Official runtime image with Debian or default upstream tooling. |
| `alpine` | `denoland/deno:alpine-<version>` | `latest-alpine`, `2.8-alpine`, `2.8.3-alpine` | Official Alpine runtime image where upstream publishes one. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each release line also gets line aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno:<line>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno:<line>-alpine
```

The newest resolved version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/deno:latest-alpine
```

## Status Meanings

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned version on the newest pinned release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned version on another current pinned line. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a current pinned release line. Kept for reproducibility. |
| Deprecated | Older release line. Kept only for legacy rebuilds. |

Deno images track pinned upstream releases. Older versions are kept for reproducible rebuilds.

## Published Versions

| Version | Full image tag | Alpine image tag | Alias tags | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`2.8.3`](deno/2.8.3.md) | `2.8.3` | `2.8.3-alpine` | `latest`, `latest-alpine`, `2.8`, `2.8-alpine` | Current |
| [`2.8.2`](deno/2.8.2.md) | `2.8.2` | `2.8.2-alpine` | None | Superseded |
| [`2.4.5`](deno/2.4.5.md) | `2.4.5` | `2.4.5-alpine` | `2.4`, `2.4-alpine` | Supported |
| [`2.4.4`](deno/2.4.4.md) | `2.4.4` | `2.4.4-alpine` | None | Superseded |
| [`2.3.7`](deno/2.3.7.md) | `2.3.7` | `2.3.7-alpine` | `2.3`, `2.3-alpine` | Deprecated |

## Version Sources

CI refreshes this runtime from every matching upstream release git tag, then
merges those discovered versions with pinned versions in
`generic/deno/versions.yml`.
